Hi,

Emacs 23.4 is out which has this fix. I'm planning to submit PRs for
editors/emacs, editors/emacs-devel updates along with -exp run required for
bsd.emacs.mk changes today after some testing. Could you please hold commit=
ing
this PR ?

Thanks
